decisions: D-01: Form appears via in-place content replacement — renderForm(r, container) replaces view content; back button returns to detail (edit) or grid (new). No new route.
D-02: Save gate — name, creator, ingredients, method are required; all other fields optional.
D-03: Entry points — 'New Recipe' button in Recipe Book page header for add; 'Edit' button on recipe detail card for edit.
D-04: Upload UI lives on the recipe detail view, below the existing images section. Not inside the edit form.
D-06: Post-upload — patch recipe.images array in State, re-save, re-render images section inline immediately using raw GitHub URL.
D-07: Export and import both use ZIP format (all 4 data files bundled). Format symmetry required.
D-08: Import flow — ZIP preview (list what will be overwritten), then single confirm click before writing to GitHub.
D-09: Export trigger is a button click; import supports both file picker and drag-and-drop onto a drop zone.
D-10: Export/Import section lives in the existing Settings page (no new route or nav item).
D-11: User provides a freeform text prompt (e.g. 'smoky mezcal sour'); AI fills name, tagline, ingredients, method, glassware, garnish, tasting_notes, suggested_occasions.
D-12: Generate lives inside the recipe form — prompt field at the top of the form, available when creating a new recipe.
D-13: UX — spinner on Generate button while pending; fields populate inline when response arrives; user edits then saves.
D-14: Anthropic API key stored in localStorage, configured in Settings. If absent, Generate button is hidden/disabled with tooltip pointing to Settings.
